text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
On my way back from an errand I<n>was given by
Director Akikawa,<n>Winning Ticket stops me.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Trainer over there! You seen a<n>white snake
around?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Another empty lead? White snake,<n>where could
you be?!
choice_data_list: Why are you looking for a white snake anyway?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I need one for a good luck charm! It's<n>a super
high-level spell!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: WAIT, SERIOUSLY?!
choice_data_list: You didn't tell her the details?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
She ran off before I had the chance<n>to! And we
didn't even have any<n>clues to go on!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I bet Granny'd use hermagic and find it straight away.
choice_data_list: She sounds like an incredible woman.
She sounds like an incredible woman.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
She is! That's why I wanna be a<n>great witch like
her one day!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
In that case, let's go ask your granny<n>to help us
out!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Nooo way! This is something I have to<n>handle
myself!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...I'll never be like Granny if I don't!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I will find that white snake, and Iwill use it for the ritual! And thenI'll become a real witch!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: AWWW YEEEAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You're really trying to make your<n>dream come
true! That fighting spirit<n>makes me feel sooo...
FIRED UP!<n>Wooo! Thanks for the boost!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna help you out! One way or<n>another,
we'll find that white snake!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Heh! Then the search is back on! You<n>help too!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so I find myself roped into a<n>snake hunt...
We comb the fields<n>together but come up
empty-handed.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: That's it! I'm tired of walking! Iwanna go hooooome!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: We can't quit now! Let's search the<n>town!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: There's no way it'll be here!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
We have to try, no matter how slim<n>our chances!
Come on, we're just<n>getting warmed up here,
guys!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna give you all I got, Sweep! If<n>you feel
like dropping out, I'm gonna<n>pick you right back
up! That's what<n>I'm here to do!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Hmph! Who said I'm giving up?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah, Sweep! Hehe, that's the spirit!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Hold on a sec... Do you see<n>what I see in
that store window?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I FOUND IT! It's a white snaaake!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: With its geometric patterns and eyeslike glass marbles, the snake lookslike something an artist would make...Oh wait, it is a work of art.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Not real?! No way... It can't be...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaah! I'm so sorry, Sweep! Ithought we finally had it! Sob!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...It's fine, we'll go with this snake.<n>It'll be less
effective, but a doll can<n>work as a substitute—at
least, that's<n>what my grimoire says.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Yep, this'll do! I'm gonna be a<n>full-fledged witch,
so I'll prove that I<n>can pull this ritual off, real
snake or<n>no!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Sweep! Ohhhh, Sweeeeep! You're<n>gonna make
such an amazing witch!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We successfully purchase—er,<n>"capture" the
white snake, bringing a<n>joyful end to our ordeal.
